creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #4)

Should

man 7 hier

not be updated to reflect this then?

It explicitly states (on 12,1-RELEASE) for /usr/local/

...
Within local/, the general layout sketched out by
hier for /usr should be used.  Exceptions are the
man directory (directly under local/ rather than
under local/share/)
...

Which prompted me to agree with Michael Bueker...
